title: Supermized
description: ♾️ Optimize your minecraft instance to its limits!
body:
This modpack was made for utility and preformance, Support us by joining our [discord](https://discord.gg/ak2ywjddbp)!

| Software names | MacOS (Intel) | Linux (Arch) | Windows (11) |
|----------------|---------------|--------------|--------------|
| FPS            | FPS 200       | FPS 840      | FPS 403      |
| Nvidium        | ❌            | ✅           | ✅           |


### Super Fast Performance 

**SuperMized** is built to make Minecraft run as fast as possible. This mod pack can give you over 700 FPS, making the game smooth and enjoyable.

### Tested on macOS and Linux

I've tested **SuperMized** on both macOS and Linux to make sure it works great on these systems. No matter which one you use, you’ll get the same high performance.

### No Extra Stuff

**SuperMized** only includes the mods you really need. There’s no extra stuff to slow down your game. This keeps everything running fast and smooth.

### All the Best Mods

I've picked the best mods for **SuperMized**. These mods improve your Minecraft experience without making the game slow. You get all the good mods and none of the junk.
